evals.name: vague-request-on-realistic-module
evals.prompt: 我维护一个 Python 后端服务，里头有个 notification/ 模块，包含 email_sender.py、sms_sender.py、push_sender.py 三个文件。每个文件自己处理 retry、rate limit、logging，三套实现细节都不一样。新人 onboarding 一头雾水，最近还出过一次 SMS 重试 16 次打爆下游配额的事故。这块架构能怎么改进？给我列几个候选方向并解释为什么。
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers; produces 3-5 candidates each with Cluster / Why they're coupled / Dependency category / Test impact / Expected leverage / Migration cost-risk / Confidence; at least one candidate proposes a deep send/dispatch boundary; recommends a follow-up step without auto-writing an RFC.

evals.name: rfc-review-and-dependency-classification
evals.prompt: 我之前给 cache layer 写了个 RFC，把 redis_cache.py 和 memory_cache.py 合并成一个统一的 CacheLayer 接口，用 ports/adapters 暴露 Redis 和 in-memory 两个实现。我对 dependency category 判定不太确定——Redis 是我们自己运维的内部集群，这种算 remote-but-owned 还是 local-substitutable？另外现有 30 个 unit test 大部分都在 mock redis 调用，boundary tests 该怎么补、哪些 unit test 可以删？
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers; classifies Redis-as-internal-cluster correctly (remote-but-owned because contract is owned, transport is remote); recommends in-memory adapter for tests; gives concrete boundary-test list and identifies which existing mocked-out unit tests become redundant; does not rewrite the RFC unless asked.

evals.name: no-op-deepening-should-leave-alone
evals.prompt: 我的 utils/string_utils.py 是一个 80 行的纯函数库（slugify、camel_to_snake、truncate_with_ellipsis 这几个），团队里有人觉得太小，建议和 utils/text_utils.py 合并成一个 deep module。但我看这两个文件各自挺简单，独立测试也容易。帮我做个 deepening 分析，到底要不要合并？
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers; explicitly recommends 'leave alone for now' with reasoning (shallow modules can be fine when they have no orchestration, no shared callers benefit from unification, and tests are already cheap); does NOT fabricate an RFC just to fill the workflow; cites the working heuristic about not extracting for testability when coupling already lives elsewhere.
